artPrompt: An ornate hero shot of a gleaming brass potato-shaped charm hovering mid-air above outstretched goblin hands, its polished surface catching firelight as it seems forever in the act of being passed along; bonfire glow and drifting sparks frame it in flame-orange, the riotous square dissolving into ember-red haze and night-black smoke, the object restless and dreamlike, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: The Buck Stops Nowhere
text:
The Buck Stops Nowhere can't sit still. Physically slide or hand this card to the player on your left at the beginning of each upkeep. Whoever is holding it controls it.
Whoever holds The Buck Stops Nowhere takes 1 damage during their upkeep and may flip a coin: if heads, immediately pass the buck to anyone they like and skip the damage. The buck must always be passed counterclockwise unless somebody panics.
flavorText: Accountability is a beautiful thing to keep moving.

extras.physicalAction: physically pass the card around the table
extras.fourthWall: whoever is holding the card controls it
